Web Developer

BrightPath Studio is hiring a junior Web Developer to help build and maintain
small business websites, landing pages, and internal web tools. This is a
hands-on role for someone comfortable turning simple designs and requirements
into clean, responsive pages.

Requirements:
- Build responsive web pages with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
- Update existing website content, layouts, and navigation
- Work with basic design mockups or written feature requests
- Test pages across Chrome, Safari, Firefox, and mobile screen sizes
- Fix common front-end bugs related to layout, forms, and browser behavior
- Use Git to commit changes and collaborate with other developers
- Communicate clearly with designers, project managers, and clients

Nice to have:
- Experience with React or another front-end framework
- Familiarity with accessibility basics and semantic HTML
- Basic understanding of website performance and SEO best practices
